title: In Hungary, Ambedkar inspires oppressed Roma
description: A school in Hungary, inspired by B.R. Ambedkar, serves as a beacon for the Roma community, mirroring their struggles with oppression. Founded by a sociologist and Roma activist, the school translates Ambedkar's texts and teaches Roma history, fostering empowerment. Graduates are becoming local leaders, and girls' education is improving, reflecting Ambedkar's ideals.

title: Faster clearance for imported food stuff likely

How Iran is using China’s playbook to counter Donald Trump’s threats
description: Nearly six weeks of fighting between Iran and the United States have paused, but tensions remain after talks failed. Donald Trump has increased pressure by threatening to block the Strait of Hormuz, a key global oil route. Iran is responding by using control of the strait as leverage, similar to how China earlier countered US pressure using rare-earth supplies. This has already pushed oil prices higher and raised concerns over fuel costs and inflation. Iran has shown no sign of backing down, signalling a longer standoff ahead

title: NFL reporter Melanie Collins stuns fans with offseason beach snap
description: Melanie Collins closed her eighth NFL season with CBS after covering the NFC Championship Game, continuing her steady rise as a trusted sideline reporter. Working alongside Kevin Harlan and Trent Green, she has become a consistent presence in high-profile broadcasts. With a background that includes ESPN, Yahoo Sports, and major global events, Collins brings depth and versatility to her role. As the offseason begins, she is taking time away before an expected return for the next NFL season.
